project_type: Static HTML frontend + Cloudflare Worker backend (social media downloader)
build_system: None - single HTML file, no build tools
test_framework: None - static HTML file, manual browser testing
verification_instructions: Open index.html in browser, verify UI renders correctly, verify all platform icons/labels are shown, verify download format selector works, verify worker.js contains correct Cobalt API integration
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure static HTML file
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - proxy blocks most external sites. Only GitHub integration is accessible. Cannot test live API calls. Validation is structural/AST-based only.
contribution_requirements: No formal contribution guide. Single-file project on main branch.
key_patterns: Current app: single index.html with inline CSS and JS. Uses fetch POST to Cloudflare Worker URL. Worker proxies to Cobalt API. Response format expects {url, picker[], status, text}. Cobalt API supports: downloadMode (auto/audio/mute), videoQuality, filenameStyle, twitterGif, tiktokFullAudio, tiktokH265, disableMetadata.
